mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (id, user_id, target_type, target_id, content, like_count, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, content, like_count AS likeCount, create_time AS createTime FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, content, like_count AS likeCount, create_time AS createTime FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
